Hey team, in this video we're going to show you how you can get the membership click funnel that you can provide to your members as part of the hybrid fulfillment. So below this video we're going to give you a button that takes you to the import for that. When you click on that button, it may take you to click funnels to sign in. Once you sign in, it's going to take you to the shared funnels being processed page. Now I already had a funnel that I shared before, that's why that one completed really quick. That's not the one I want. The one that's taking a few moments, this progress bar, that's the one that's actually importing into your account. So look for that one if you have more than one. Once it's done, that progress bar fills up like we just saw, go and click on this view funnel, and it's going to take you right to your new funnel. So if you want to do the basic things that you need to do for any funnels such as update the domain and the pads, you can do that now. So to update the domain, you go over to settings over here at the top right. Where it says domain, you click on that, choose whichever domain name you want to use. You can change your group tag if you want to. You can change the name of the funnel as well, but I'm happy with that. Then click the screen save and update button at the very bottom. It's going to take you back to the main page. If you notice it doesn't update the domain right away. Sometimes you have to give it a few seconds and then refresh. And it'll update it there. So now we're good to go. If you want to change the path, the part that's at the end of it, click on this gear icon right there where it says funnel step settings. For path, go and give it a new name for that path. So I'm going to call this... Moment... Funnel. And then I'm going to select and copy this path. So it's on my clipboard. That's control C on a Windows computer, command C on a Mac. And then click this green update funnel step button. Here's a preview of our login page. Below that I'm going to click this gear icon, this edit page split test settings. And where it has that path, I'm going to select it and I'm going to paste, replacing it with what I did to the other path. And then click update page. Now if you do that and you notice a whole bunch of random letters and numbers at the end of it, that means you have another funnel on your account that's already using that one. And you need to pick something more unique for your page. Let's go ahead and update our login page, change the things we need to on there. So hit this yellow edit page button at the bottom. You want to update this gem logo first. So this should be your gem logo. You can optionally delete it if you don't want your logo there. But to update it, you click on the image on the right hand side to image. Click on this icon next to the URL for the current one. And then if you have it already in your ClickFunnels account, it may show in this area here. If you don't, you can upload a new image by clicking the upload button, select your gem logo from your computer, upload it and it should have it selected. Then you can click this green add image and it's going to replace it. I'm going to hit cancel because I'm not changing that image right now, but you should change it or delete it so that way it's not just this generic one. Another section we need to update on your login page are the privacy policy and terms of use buttons. You need to have a terms of use and privacy policy on every page you have. To update a button link, go and click on that button. It should open the sidebar on the right and you want to click this green set action button. It's set to go to website URL and to open a new tab slash window, that's exactly what you want. Here where it says enter website URL, you want to put in the link to your privacy policy. Once you get your link in there, double check for any typos. It looks good. And hit this back at the top right and then click back to the page. You see where it shows privacy policy and now has it gray and it shows a URL instead of being red and showing warning. So make sure you update your privacy policy in terms of use. There's one more thing that we need to update on the login page. Go to settings up at the top. Go to SEO metadata. When you click on that, it's going to open the sidebar and this is going to be the title page. You can call this whatever you'd like. Just remember that it's going to be visible to your clients and if they make a bookmark either on their phone or their computer, this is going to be the name of it. So I give it a name 123 Fitness Portal login. You can call yours whatever you'd like. Just remember your clients are going to see this. So make sure you pick something that when they look at it, they're going to know what this is going to go and click back to my page. We've made all those changes. It's good and save. Save again for good measure. And then preview. When you do the preview, you should see the preview. When you do the preview, you should see this updated logo and you want to go and test the button links for your terms of use and privacy policy. If everything looks good, you can go and close this out. And hit this exit arrow at the top left. Let's go ahead to the second step, the actual membership portal. Now this is going to be a bit different than any other ClickFunnels membership portal you've worked with. Whenever you import or copy a ClickFunnel, it's going to create kind of a filler lesson, a filler section. So I'm going to delete that first. So it says first section here, first lesson, we need to get rid of that. So I'm going to click delete. Because are you sure? Go ahead. Okay. There we go. So here's our secret sign up URL. This is the URL that you can use to go and create an account for somebody. Or if you want them to create their own account, you can send them this URL. If you've created the account for them and given them a username and password, this login URL is what you can give them to go to the login page as well. Let's go ahead and hit this open an editor button on the right hand side. And it's going to take us to the actual editor for this. And now you're going to see all of the content. One thing you should notice is that right now all of the weeks are expanded. That's showing everything at once. And so we'll fix that later on. But just keep in mind that that's okay. This won't be the final version. What you need to do is go through the content in this funnel and update it wherever you want to update it. If you want to use your own custom videos, you can upload them to YouTube as unlisted videos. Click on the video. Then here where it says YouTube URL, replace that with the URL to your YouTube video, normally unlisted. If you want to change any of the text or images, you can click on it to update it. So you click on the text to update the text. If you want to update this little image on the left, you want to click on the gear icon for that section. And you can change the image right there. And that's the same for each one of these. We do provide some buttons that go to scales on Amazon or to food lists. The food list with a hand measuring, a meal plans, links to My Fitness Pal and the App Store and the Google Play Store. More fitness plan and meal links. So if you make your own custom content, you want to go in here on each of these buttons. Click set action and change that link right there. Change that to wherever you wanted to point to. You can leave it as is. It will work. But this way, you're able to avoid having to go through that hassle of dealing with mismatch content. So once you've gone through all of these sections, all the way through week 16, you've updated anything you want to update. We can go to settings and SEO metadata. You want to give this a good name as well. Just in case they bookmark this page. I want to click back and it's updated that. And so now we need to make it to where it hides all of these weeks by default. That way, when they click on one of the buttons, it's going to show only the week that they click it for. Go to section, rows, columns at the top. And so under rows, we want to click manage right there. And we have a few different sections here. This first section is just for the logo at the top. Here where it says section and four column row, if you notice it does highlight the section that you move your mouse over. So leave the four column row alone, but these one column rows, we want to hide them. So we're clicking on that little eyeball so it has the marker cross it and it's gray. If you've noticed it hides the weeks that we click it on. So we want to do the same for this one. There's that four column row. We're going to leave that one alone, but we're going to go to these one column rows underneath it in that section and hide those. The last one, the recovery. That's a three column row. Leave that one alone, but for the one column row, click on the eyeball to hide it. You don't want to hide the collapse all button at the bottom this one column row by itself. And you don't want to hide the logo at the top. Let's go ahead and save it. And save again for good measure. And then click on the preview button. This is going to open a preview of what this is going to look like. Go through each week. Make sure that the videos work that that's a video you want. Click on each button. Make sure the button goes to where you want it to go to test every single week, every single video, every single button. That way your clients won't run into any issues when they come in and use this. And always make sure that you have the final product like this. And you can see, you know that you've hidden the right sections. You should see all three phases, but none of the weeks below. And as you click on each week, it should appear. You can click through each one. And then you can always hit this collapse all button at the bottom to close it all and see what it looks like when you first load it out. I'm going to go ahead and close out on my preview. I'm happy with how this looks. So I'm going to go and hit this exit arrow at the top left. Now, if I wanted to start creating the accounts. I would copy the secret sign up URL and I would sign out of ClickFunnels. And then I would go to the secret sign up URL and start creating the account. And then you can provide your clients the email address and password and hit create account. And they'll be signed into it. That's it for getting your membership ClickFunnels set out. If you have any questions, reach out to our tech support team or your coach. We're always happy to help. Hope you have a great rest of your day.
